AlwaysAppearOpen.description: True if the store always appears open

PreOrderEnabled.description: True if the store accepts pre-orders

TakeOutEnabled.description: True if the store accepts take-out orders

TableServiceEnabled.description: True if the store has table service

DineInEnabled.description: True if the store accepts dine-in orders

AllowPreOrdersAndTableService.description: True if both pre-orders and talbe service can be enabled

PickupEnabled.description: True if the store accepts pickup orders

DeliveryEnabled.description: True if the store accepts delivery orders

CardOrderDeliveryEnabled.description: True if the store accepts card payment for delivery orders

CashOrdersDeliveryEnabled.description: True if the store accepts cash payment for delivery orders

CardOrdersPickupEnabled.description: True if the store accepts card payment for pickup orders

CashOrdersPickupEnabled.description: True if the store accepts cash payment for pickup orders

TipsEnabled.description: True if the store accepts tips

AutomaticallyAcceptOrders.description: True if the stores orders are automatically accepted in Flipdish

OpenForDelivery.description: True if the store is open for delivery

OpenForPickup.description: True if the store is open for pickup

RequireCustomerNameForPickup.description: True if customer name required for pickup orders

GdprCustomerPhoneNumbers.description: Mask your customers phone numbers printed on receipts and reduce the amout of personally identifiable customer information that is exposed.

RequireCustomerNameForDelivery.description: True if customer name required for delivery orders

AllowChefNotes.description: True if the customer is allowed enter custom notes with their orders

EtaInPickupConfirmationSmsEnabled.description: True if order confirmation sms includes estimated time when order will be ready for collection

EtaInDeliveryConfirmationSmsEnabled.description: True if order confirmation sms includes estimated time when order will delivered

StaffLanguage.description:
Staff Language (used for communication with the staff)
Emails, Printouts etc
